mapper.select: SELECT id, supplier_name, contact_person, phone, address, status FROM supplier WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, supplier_name, contact_person, phone, address, status FROM supplier WHERE supplier_name = #{supplierName} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, supplier_name, contact_person, phone, address, status FROM supplier ORDER BY status DESC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier SET supplier_name = #{supplierName}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
